content.problemStatement: Q7) A . Describe any three graphics functions used to draw shapes in C. ?   ---3 Marks.
content.outputFormat: Print three graphics functions used to draw shapes in C, each on a separate line, prefixed with numbering as shown in the sample.

sampleTestCases.output:
1. line() function to draw a line
2. circle() function to draw a circle
3. rectangle() function to draw a rectangle
sampleTestCases.explanation: The program prints the three required graphics functions, each on its own line.

hidden.label: minimum boundary
hidden.expectedOutput:
1. line() function to draw a line
2. circle() function to draw a circle
3. rectangle() function to draw a rectangle

hidden.label: maximum boundary
hidden.expectedOutput:
1. line() function to draw a line
2. circle() function to draw a circle
3. rectangle() function to draw a rectangle

hidden.expectedOutput:
1. line() function to draw a line
2. circle() function to draw a circle
3. rectangle() function to draw a rectangle

hidden.label: general case 1
hidden.expectedOutput:
1. line() function to draw a line
2. circle() function to draw a circle
3. rectangle() function to draw a rectangle

hidden.label: general case 2
hidden.expectedOutput:
1. line() function to draw a line
2. circle() function to draw a circle
3. rectangle() function to draw a rectangle

solution.approach: The task does not require any computation. The program simply prints three predefined strings describing common graphics functions in C. We loop once (T = 1) to satisfy the generic requirement of handling test cases, then output the three lines.
solution.timeComplexity: O(1) – only a constant number of print statements are executed.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – no additional data structures are used.
